app.name: Remult
app.one_liner: Full-stack CRUD, simplified, with SSOT TypeScript entities

screens.name: Entity Dashboard
screens.purpose: View and manage data through auto-generated CRUD interfaces based on shared TypeScript entities.

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch a paginated, filtered list of entity records using consistent query syntax across client and server.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist an entity instance with full-stack validation and type safety.

mvp_plan: week 1: Define a Task entity with id and title fields
week 1: Implement save and list commands using Remult's repo API
week 1: Set up Remult with Express and SQLite
acceptance_tests: Bulk update and delete operations with 'where:all' and 'select:none' behave as expected without side effects.
User can create a new item and it appears in the list immediately with correct validation applied on both client and server.
